CloudVault Systems

Enterprise infrastructure simplified through intelligent cloud orchestration

Now Hiring: Lead Cloud Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) · Full-time · $185,000 - $235,000 per year

J

oin CloudVault Systems as a Lead Cloud Engineer to drive the architecture and operational excellence of our

AWS infrastructure platform. You'll lead a team of 4-5 engineers, mentor their technical growth, and own the

design and implementation of large-scale cloud infrastructure solutions for enterprise clients. This is a hands-on

leadership role where you'll balance people management with deep technical contribution, architecting multi-

account AWS deployments, optimizing cloud costs, and establishing infrastructure best practices across the
organization and our customer base.

A B O U T U S

CloudVault Systems is a mid-stage cloud infrastructure and DevOps solutions provider founded in 2018. We help

enterprise customers architect, deploy, and optimize their AWS environments at scale. Our platform abstracts

cloud complexity through intelligent automation, cost intelligence, and compliance management. With 150+

employees and serving 200+ enterprise clients, we're building the next generation of cloud infrastructure tooling.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead and mentor a team of 4-5 Cloud and DevOps Engineers, providing technical guidance, code reviews, and
career development

Design and architect enterprise-grade AWS infrastructure solutions including multi-account strategies, VPC

networking, security controls, and disaster recovery plans

Develop and maintain Terraform modules and CloudFormation templates as infrastructure-as-code standards

for the platform

Implement and optimize AWS cost management strategies using Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, and

Compute Optimizer; drive customer ROI

Establish infrastructure security best practices including IAM policies, encryption, VPC security groups, and

compliance frameworks

Lead infrastructure automation initiatives using Lambda, EventBridge, and Systems Manager to reduce

operational overhead

Conduct architectural reviews with enterprise customers and internal stakeholders to ensure cloud solutions

meet performance, security, and cost objectives

Collaborate with product and platform teams to define infrastructure roadmap and influence technical direction

 On-call escalation support for critical infrastructure incidents; drive post-mortems and continuous improvement

initiatives

R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

6+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure engineering, with 3+ years in AWS-focused roles

2+ years of experience leading or mentoring technical teams

Expert-level proficiency with AWS core services (EC2, VPC, IAM, Lambda, RDS, S3) and architecture best

practices

Strong hands-on experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools (Terraform or CloudFormation); ability to design

reusable, scalable templates

Solid understanding of networking concepts (subnetting, routing, security groups, VPCs) and experience

designing secure multi-tier architectures

Demonstrated expertise in AWS cost optimization, Reserved Instances, and billing analysis

Advanced troubleshooting skills; ability to diagnose and resolve complex infrastructure issues under pressure

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional or Advanced Networking - Specialty certification

Experience with Kubernetes or container orchestration (ECS, EKS) and related DevOps tooling

Proficiency with scripting languages (Python, Bash) for automation and Infrastructure-as-Code enhancement

Experience with monitoring and observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, X-Ray)

Background in SaaS platform infrastructure or multi-tenant architecture design

Experience with CI/CD pipelines and GitOps workflows

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

AWS (EC2, VPC, IAM, Lambda, RDS, S3, ECS, CloudWatch), Terraform, CloudFormation, AWS Systems
Manager, AWS Cost Explorer & Compute Optimizer, Python, Bash/Shell scripting, Git & GitHub, Docker &

Container orchestration, Prometheus & Grafana

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary and performance-based bonus (up to 15% annually)

Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance with company-paid premiums

401(k) matching up to 6% with immediate vesting

Unlimited PTO policy with minimum 3 weeks encouraged

Professional development budget ($2,500/year for certifications, conferences, training)

Flexible remote work policy; work from anywhere (US-based)

 Free annual AWS certification exam reimbursement

Equity grants for senior technical roles

T O A P P LY

To apply, please submit your resume, a portfolio of AWS projects or infrastructure contributions, and a brief cover
letter describing your experience leading engineering teams. Apply via our careers page at cloudvault.com/careers

or email recruiting@cloudvault.com with the subject line 'Lead Cloud Engineer - SF'.
